title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of preserving and promoting cultural heritage, then decide which two are most important for future generations.
options: Restoring and maintaining historic buildings and monuments
Digitising and making cultural collections freely available online
Teaching local history and heritage in schools
Supporting traditional crafts, arts and cultural practices
Protecting archaeological sites from commercial development

script.text: Now decide which two are most important for future generations.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to heritage, culture and identity. Discuss the following ways of preserving and promoting cultural heritage, then decide which two are most important for future generations. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
